description_long: This is a yellow coupe car with a sporty, aerodynamic design, featuring a prominent rear spoiler and a low, aggressive stance. The car has four doors, dark-tinted windows, and a set of multi-spoke alloy wheels. The front end is characterized by a wide grille, three black hood vents, and a set of four round headlights. The rear showcases a pair of sleek taillights and a visible license plate, with the spoiler adding to its performance-oriented look. The side profile reveals smooth, flowing lines and flush door handles, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette. The overall appearance suggests a modern, high-performance vehicle suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A yellow, four-door coupe car with a sporty rear spoiler, dark windows, and alloy wheels, designed for performance and style. Its aerodynamic shape and aggressive detailing make it stand out in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, three black hood vents, four round headlights, and the license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, alloy wheels, tinted windows, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spoiler, taillights, rear window, and the license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four doors, wheels, and the rear spoiler.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with two side windows per side
